title: Ultra Fast Vanilla
description: This pack is 100% Vanilla in terms of gameplay but 100% optimized. In the base pack comes no QoL mod so its great for raw performance or as a base pack.  Everyone should feel free to use it a base.
body:
This pack is 100% Vanilla in terms of gameplay but 100% optimized. In the base pack comes no QoL mod so its great for raw performance or as a base pack.  Everyone should feel free to use it a base. MY SPECS:CPU

	Intel(R) Pentium(R) Gold 7505 @ 2.00GHz

	8GB ddr3 of RAM 

    GPU Intel(R) UHD Graphics
